metadata.title: For All the Saints
metadata.subtitle: William W. How (1864) — "Sine Nomine" tune by Vaughan Williams (1906)
metadata.x_pd_basis: How (d. 1897) > 125 years post-mortem. "Sine Nomine" tune was first published in *The English Hymnal* (1906) — > 95 years and entered US public domain in 2002 under the 95-year rule
